description: The Clan Mazzarella is a Camorra criminal organization operating in several neighborhoods of Naples, Italy. Historically considered one of the most powerful Camorra clans, it was founded by the Zaza family in the 1940s and later came under the control of the Mazzarella brothers. Currently, it is divided into several branches, each with its own regent.

country_links.evidence_quote: Il 10 febbraio 2009, dopo due anni di latitanza, Ciro Mazzarella viene arrestato a Santo Domingo
country_links.context: Ciro Mazzarella was arrested in Santo Domingo, indicating the clan's presence in the Dominican Republic.

country_links.evidence_quote: Il 17 dicembre 2004 viene identificato e nuovamente arrestato all'interno del parco Eurodisney, a Parigi, il latitante Vincenzo Mazzarella
country_links.context: Latiant Vincenzo Mazzarella was arrested at Eurodisney in Paris, showing the clan's footprint in France.

country_links.evidence_quote: L'ultimo capo del ramo Zaza, Salvatore Zaza, era coinvolto in un ampio piano di traffico internazionale di cocaina dal Perù verso l'Europa, con l'intenzione di acquisire il controllo totale del porto di Callao
country_links.context: The Zaza branch of the Mazzarella clan was involved in international cocaine trafficking from Peru to Europe.

country_links.evidence_quote: Il 10 giugno 2002 viene arrestato in Spagna il latitante Ciro Mazzarella
country_links.context: Latiant Ciro Mazzarella was arrested in Spain, indicating the clan's presence there.
